payload.author: codex
payload.body: Fixed the immediate remote-to-iOS visibility gap. Root cause was app-side: Board/Graph were constructing EventStream from baseURL only, dropping HubClient bearer/session behavior, and EventStream expected embedded Ticket payloads while the server emits coarse change envelopes such as sync.applied and remote.pulled. iOS now parses those envelopes and refreshes the canonical /api/tickets snapshot; graph relation refreshes are also nudged on coarse change events. Added ScopeTests EventStream coverage and a shared Xcode scheme.
